title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: The Transformer paper introduced a sequence transduction architecture based entirely on attention mechanisms, becoming a foundation for modern large language models.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
abstract: BERT showed how bidirectional Transformer pre-training can produce strong language representations for a wide range of NLP tasks.

title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
abstract: ResNet introduced residual connections that made it practical to train very deep neural networks, reshaping modern computer vision.

title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: This paper popularized chain-of-thought prompting as a simple way to elicit multi-step reasoning behavior from sufficiently large language models.
